workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline. Skip if session hits 65 min.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: May 26: hit 360 × 10 × 3 clean. Adding 10 lb today. Controlled tempo — don't lock out at the top.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: May 26: hit 170 × 12 × 3 clean. Machine is plate-loaded — 10 lb increments only. Full hip extension at top, squeeze glutes, no hyperextension.

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.note: May 26: hit 50 × 12 × 3 clean, back felt fine. Bumping to 55 lb. Hinge from hips, soft knee bend, feel the hamstring stretch at the bottom.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: Hamstrings are the consistent weak link — got 12/9/7 on May 26. Holding at 77 lb. Cap last set at 10 reps even if you have more.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge (DB)
exercises.note: May 22: 25 lb felt easy. Bumping to 30 lb. Drive through heel of front foot, keep torso upright. Back knee close to the floor.

exercises.name: Core Circuit B
exercises.detail: Pallof Press 40 lb × 10/side + Ab Wheel × 8–10 + Bird Dog × 8/side · 2 rounds
exercises.rest: Minimal rest between movements, 60s between rounds
exercises.note: Pallof Press: stand tall, resist rotation. Ab Wheel: from knees, only extend as far as your lower back stays flat. Bird Dog: opposite arm/leg, pause 1 sec at top.
